commits.summary: feat: add Enron-format email normalizer (agents/ingestion, issue #17 3.3.2)

key_judgment_calls_for_verifier: Thread-id derivation is a two-tier fallback (In-Reply-To/References verbatim, else normalized-subject key with 'subject:' prefix) since the real Enron corpus has no native thread-id header -- documented in normalize_email.py module docstring and plan.md, not silently invented.

Fixtures are hand-authored (not real corpus data or programmatic generation) since no real Enron sample files exist anywhere in this repo (confirmed via find/grep; data/ only has a planning README for issue #19) and Enron format is plain-text (unlike 3.3.1's binary PDF, where programmatic generation was necessary).
Sender field prefers bare address (via email.utils.parseaddr) over full 'Display Name <addr>' text when an address is parseable.
test_status: 9/9 passed via agents/.venv/bin/python -m pytest agents/ingestion/test_normalize_email.py -v, run 3x for flakiness, all consistent
next_step: Requires independent verification via /cdr:verify (invariant I4 -- this agent does not verify its own work).
